summary: Completed comprehensive testing of role-based UI visibility and route protection. All 10 test cases passed (100%). Admin sees full sidebar with all nav items and can access all pages. Regular users see only 'My Apps' and 'Request Access' in sidebar and are properly redirected to /launcher when attempting to access admin-only routes.
passed_tests: Admin sees full sidebar with all 12 nav items: Dashboard, App Launcher, App Catalog, SAML Apps, OIDC Apps, Users, Groups, Roles, Policies, Access Requests, Audit Logs, Settings
User sees only 2 nav items: 'My Apps' and 'Request Access'
User can access /launcher (My Apps) and sees assigned Kissflow app
User can access /catalog (Request Access) to see and request apps
critical_code_review_comments: AdminRoute component in App.js correctly checks user.role === 'org_admin' || user.role === 'admin' and redirects non-admins to /launcher
DefaultRedirect component correctly sends admins to Dashboard and users to /launcher
Layout.js correctly uses conditional navSections based on isAdmin flag to show different sidebar items
All admin-only routes properly wrapped with AdminRoute component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based UI visibility is fully working. Key implementation: 1) AdminRoute component in App.js wraps admin-only routes and redirects non-admins to /launcher. 2) DefaultRedirect sends admins to Dashboard (/) and users to /launcher. 3) Layout.js uses conditional navSections - admins see full menu (adminSections), users see limited menu (userSections with only My Apps and Request Access). 4) User role label shows 'Admin' or 'User' in sidebar based on isAdmin flag.

verified_features.admin_login_redirect: Admin (org_admin) redirected to Dashboard (/) on login
verified_features.user_login_redirect: Regular user redirected to /launcher on login
verified_features.admin_sidebar: Full sidebar with 12 nav items: Dashboard, App Launcher, App Catalog, SAML Apps, OIDC Apps, Users, Groups, Roles, Policies, Access Requests, Audit Logs, Settings
verified_features.user_sidebar: Limited sidebar with 2 nav items: My Apps, Request Access
verified_features.admin_route_protection: All 9 admin-only routes properly redirect non-admins to /launcher
verified_features.admin_access: Admin can access all 12 routes without restriction
verified_features.user_role_label: Sidebar shows 'Admin' for admins, 'User' for regular users
